referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Compact split hero on white background with large heading and CTA cluster on the left and a rounded media card with floating stat chips on the right.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Bold modern sans headline with tight leading and short line lengths; subcopy is concise and airy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Four inline muted chips directly below hero, each showing one large metric with minimal supporting text.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Four-card service grid with small media thumbnail and short service label-first hierarchy.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Single spotlight row with image on one side and concise copy on the other emphasizing one signature capability.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: One featured testimonial module with patient image, star score, and a compact quote rather than a large card grid.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: White hero -> light-tinted stats strip -> white services -> light feature panel -> white testimonial/contact transition -> oversized typographic footer accent.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Moderately airy with distinct vertical breaks, but tighter than editorial styles.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded pill buttons with solid accent primary and lightly outlined secondary actions.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Neutrals dominate section backgrounds; accent orange appears on CTA, key numbers, and small emphasis details.
